voice.language_mix: English (90%) + Hindi (10% - used for punchlines and emotional connection)
hindi_examples: Sahi Daam, Sahi Kaam (Right Price, Right Work)
Scrabit karo, Befikar raho (Scrabit it, stay worry-free)

primary.name: Praxeti White
primary.usage: Main background, cards, large surfaces. NEVER pure white (#FFFFFF) for backgrounds.

secondary.name: Mantis
secondary.usage: Primary buttons, icons, highlights, success states.

accent.name: Book Green
accent.usage: Headings, text links, borders, active states.

typography.hindi_support: Ensure font fallback supports Devanagari script gracefully.

assets.image_strategy: Since custom cartoons are unavailable, use a '3D Minimalist' style using the provided hand gestures for flair, and high-quality minimal photos for realism. Use large colored Icons for process steps.

icons.style_guide: Use 'Spot Illustration' technique: Icon size 48px+, text-mantis color, with a bg-mantis/10 rounded-xl container. Do not use naked icons.

grids.bento_features: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. First item col-span-2 row-span-2. Use for 'Why Scrabit'.
grids.process_steps: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8. Connect with a dashed line SVG if possible.

containers.card_style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

preferences.booking_button: Subtle pulse animation (scale: [1, 1.02, 1]) on loop or hover. Ring ripple effect.

buttons.primary: bg-mantis hover:bg-book-green text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-mantis/20 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-mantis text-mantis hover:bg-mantis/5 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium

inputs.style: bg-white border-black/10 focus:border-mantis focus:ring-4 focus:ring-mantis/10 rounded-xl h-12

booking_datepicker.instructions: Use Shadcn Calendar. Heavily customize CSS to match brand colors. Selected day = bg-mantis text-white. Today = text-mantis.

sections: Hero: Headline 'Cash for Trash' + Hindi Punchline. Image: 3D Globe/Hand + CTA 'Book Pickup'.
How It Works: 4-step process (Schedule -> Pickup -> Weigh -> Pay). Use Icons.
Exploitation vs Scrabit: Comparison Table. 'Local Wala' (Red X) vs 'Scrabit' (Green Check).
Impact Stats: Counters for 'Trees Saved', 'KGs Recycled', 'Energy Saved'.

pricing.structure: Category Tabs (Paper, Metal, Plastic). Grid of cards showing Price/Kg. Daily updated badge.

booking.structure: Multi-step form: 1. Select Scrap Types -> 2. Estimate Weight -> 3. Date/Time Picker -> 4. Address -> 5. Confirm.
booking.visuals: Progress bar at top. Clean white cards for each step.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup Tailwind theme colors in tailwind.config.js immediately.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the 'Layout' wrapper with the Glass Header and Footer.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Landing Page section by section. Use the Bento Grid for 'Why Us'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the Booking Flow. This is complex. Focus on state management.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Add the Hindi punchlines in headings using a span with a slightly different font-style (maybe italic or highlighted).
instructions_to_main_agent.critical_check: Ensure NO dark mode toggle. Force light mode in 'index.css' or 'html' tag.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Never use pure #000000. Use #1A1A1A or similar.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA standards.
